SELECT ae.adverse_event, ae.frequency_percent, ae.severity, t.drug_name, t.trial_name
        FROM adverse_events ae
        JOIN trials t ON ae.trial_id = t.trial_id
        WHERE LOWER(t.drug_name) LIKE '%semaglutide%'
          AND (
            LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%nausea%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%vomit%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%diarrhea%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%diarrhoea%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%constipat%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%abdominal%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%gastrointestinal%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%dyspepsia%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%gastro%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%bloat%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%reflux%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%eructation%'
            OR LOWER(ae.adverse_event) LIKE '%flatulence%'
          )
        ORDER BY ae.frequency_percent DESC

SELECT t.trial_name, t.drug, t.indication, t.n_total, t.duration_years,

        FROM safety_events se
        JOIN trials t ON se.trial_id = t.id
        WHERE LOWER(t.drug) LIKE '%semaglutide%'
          AND (
            LOWER(se.event_type) LIKE '%nausea%'
            OR LOWER(se.event_type) LIKE '%vomit%'
            OR LOWER(se.event_type) LIKE '%diarr%'
            OR LOWER(se.event_type) LIKE '%constipat%'

            OR LOWER(se.event_type) LIKE '%gi %'
